data.name: Company has an approved Secure Development Policy
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Secure Development Policy](/policies/secure-development-policy-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Secure Development Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Secure%20Development%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Secure Development Policy for your company.
